title: fangirl's skyblock modpack
description:
a modpack made by fangirl for the jump to 1.21.5 skyblock for anyone to download easily to play on the hypixel network so they can have basic things like dungeon solvers, coordinate sharing, an easy to use PV/enderchest viewer, and many more features.

Inc
body:
a modpack made by fangirl for the jump to 1.21.5 skyblock for anyone to download easily to play on the hypixel network so they can have basic things like dungeon solvers, coordinate sharing, an easy to use PV/enderchest viewer, and many more features.

Includes: 
cookies mod
Essential
compact chat
aaron's mod
firmament
tooltip scroll
+ many more
